items.label: Fragment A
reason_texts: Contradictory user fragments should remain open rather than collapsing into one ordered narrative.

excerpts.excerpt_text: A later note says the neighbour may have arrived first.
Support worker note says not enough evidence exists to settle the order and both possibilities should be kept.
I think the call came before the neighbour came over, but I cannot be certain.
Phone capture shows the call log but does not place the neighbour visit.
